ogTitle: Euston vs Evans Head: Climate Safety

heading: Euston vs Evans Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Euston, New South Wales and Evans Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evans Head has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Euston (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Euston or Evans Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Euston has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Evans Head scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Euston scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Evans Head scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Euston or Evans Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evans Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
